expectations.text: Response includes an intake exchange (1-3 questions) before the curriculum.
expectations.evidence: Agent summary: intake with goal/starting-point/scope questions. Lesson1 transcript Intake section recaps the user's answers.

expectations.text: A curriculum markdown file is saved to outputs/curriculum.md.
Curriculum references at least 3 real file paths under infra/.
expectations.evidence: deployment.yaml, service.yaml, ingress.yaml, alb.tf, hpa.yaml, eks/main.tf, karpenter-llamadeploy-nodepool.yaml — all under infra/ tree.

expectations.text: Curriculum covers general k8s/EKS concepts (not just our manifests).
expectations.evidence: Explicit generalizations: 'k8s control loop and reconciliation', 'L4 Service vs L7 Ingress and cloud LB controllers', 'control plane vs data plane, IRSA', 'two-tier autoscaling; compare Karpenter vs cluster-autoscaler'.

expectations.text: Lesson 1 starts from a real file or set of files in infra/ and ladders to a general concept.
expectations.evidence: Lesson1.md sections: (a) Ground (infra/ tree walkthrough with charts/terraform/kubernetes), (b) Generalize (provisioning vs workload boundary), (c) Compare (alternatives like ArgoCD, terraform-for-everything).

expectations.text: Lesson 1 ends with an active comprehension check.
expectations.evidence: Three-tier check: easy (which dir for image bump/RDS/curl), medium (why two staging/ dirs), 'the good one' (why is a k8s NodePool CR under terraform/).
